prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约2991→3306→3081→5081→6080名，整体呈后移趋势，尤其2024年较2023年后移约2000名、2025年较2024年后移约1000名，近两年累计后移约3000名；2025年基准位次约6080名；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划持续扩招：2021年73人、2022年79人、2023年79人、2024年84人、2025年87人；2026年（招生计划文件）计划90人，较2025年增加3人（扩招约3.45%），扩招使竞争压力略有缓解，推动最低录取位次数字增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第39名，近年稳定在38–41名区间，属于顶尖211院校，在电子信息领域具有显著影响力；2022年因学术不端事件获偏负面评价，2025年因校园霸凌事件获偏负面评价，但均未出现投档线断档记录；抖音热度排名第60（较热），综合热度约53万，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，整体报考关注度稳定；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，在电子信息与计算机领域学科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业在2023–2024年专业热度分析中均被评为"高热推荐"，与西电优势学科高度匹配，持续吸引优质生源；辽宁省2026年物理类考生约14.4万人（按总考生20万及历史比例估算），与2025年14.3万人基本持平；省控线（物理类本科批）近年稳定在360–368分区间，无明显波动；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省（非本省），在辽宁省招生占比约3%–4%，属跨省招生，无本省倾斜优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年小幅扩招3人（约3.45%）、考生规模基本持平、电子信息与计算机类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准6080名基础上继续小幅后移。扩招推动位次数字增大，但专业热度和考生规模稳定形成一定支撑，后移幅度较前两年明显收窄。预测最低位次约6236名，区间5736–6736名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）（微电子科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 电子信息类（通信）（通信工程、信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）（电子信息工程、信息对抗技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 计算机类（智能）（人工智能、智能科学与技术）
- 计算机类（网络安全）（信息安全、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）（电子科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）（机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计、自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）（信息管理与信息系统、工业工程、大数据管理与应用）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5736–6736名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业作为冲刺（需位次明显优于区间下限），三档专业作为稳妥保底。西电在电子信息与计算机领域学科优势突出，一档专业竞争激烈但回报丰厚，考生可根据自身位次合理搭配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2991 → 3306 → 3081 → 5081 → 6080, showing an overall backward trend. Especially in 2024, it shifted back by about 2000 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it shifted back by about 1000 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3000 places in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6080. The university has been continuously expanding its enrollment in Liaoning Province's Physics Category: 73 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 87 in 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan (enrollment plan document) is 90, an increase of 3 students (about 3.45%) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly eases competition pressure, pushing the minimum admission ranking number higher.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 39th, and has been stable in the 38–41 range in recent years, making it a top-tier 211 university with significant influence in the field of electronic information. In 2022, it received a somewhat negative evaluation due to an academic misconduct incident, and in 2025, it received a somewhat negative evaluation due to a campus bullying incident, but there have been no records of a cutoff line collapse. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 60th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 530,000, and medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, indicating stable overall application attention. It has A+ in Information and Communication Engineering, A+ in Electronic Science and Technology, A in Computer Science and Technology, A in Cyberspace Security, and A- in Mechanical Engineering, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above. Its disciplinary strength in electronic information and computer fields is outstanding, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer and Electronic Information/Communication majors were rated as 'highly recommended' in the 2023–2024 major popularity analysis, highly matching Xidian's advantageous disciplines, continuously attracting high-quality students. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province is about 144,000 (estimated based on a total of 200,000 candidates and historical proportions), roughly the same as the 143,000 in 2025. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has been stable in the 360–368 point range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. Xidian University is located in Shaanxi Province (not the local province), and its enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 3%–4%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local province advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the small enrollment expansion of 3 students (about 3.45%) in 2026, the basically stable number of candidates, and the sustained high popularity of electronic information and computer majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift back slightly from the 2025 baseline of 6080. The expansion pushes the ranking number higher, but the popularity of majors and the stable number of candidates provide some support, resulting in a significantly narrower backward shift compared to the previous two years. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6236, with a range of 5736–6736.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits) (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Electronic Information (Communication) (Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, Space Information and Digital Technology)
- Computer (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering) (Electronic Information Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Computer (Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Computer (Cybersecurity) (Information Security, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information) (Electronic Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training) (Information Management and Information Systems, Industrial Engineering, Big Data Management and Application).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5736–6736, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, use Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Xidian has outstanding disciplinary advantages in electronic information and computer fields. Tier 1 majors are highly competitive but offer substantial returns. Candidates can reasonably match based on their own ranking.
